description:
In the 'Facilities Renovation' project, create a Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) consisting of a parent issue and four subtasks.

Parent Issue:
- Tracker: Feature
- Subject: Office Renovation Phase 1 - Structural and Compliance
- Description: Phase 1 encompasses all structural assessment, environmental compliance, and preliminary engineering work required before renovation construction can begin.
- Priority: High

Subtasks (linked to the parent):
- Tracker: Bug, Subject: Site survey and as-built documentation, Priority: High, Estimated hours: 16
- Tracker: Feature, Subject: Structural load analysis and engineering review, Priority: High, Estimated hours: 40
- Tracker: Support, Subject: Environmental and hazardous materials assessment, Priority: Normal, Estimated hours: 24
- Tracker: Feature, Subject: Preliminary design and cost estimation report, Priority: Normal, Estimated hours: 32

metadata.parent_subject: Office Renovation Phase 1 - Structural and Compliance

subtasks.subject: Structural load analysis and engineering review
Preliminary design and cost estimation report
